entry.title: FSS GS23F0230P (PSA837) awarded to CBE GROUP INCORPORATED THE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EO14042 THIS CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED TO INCORPORATE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) CLAUSE 52.223-99 ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID-19 SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS - FEDERAL SUPPLY SCHEDULE CONTRACT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
